name: ExtensionExplanationOfBenefit_Item_Detail_Tax
title: R5: Total tax (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.detail.tax` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ExplanationOfBenefit.item.detail.tax` 0..1 `Money`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.detail.tax` 0..1 `Money`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.detail.tax` has a context of ExplanationOfBenefit.item.detail based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ExplanationOfBenefit`.
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.detail.tax` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:

element.definition: The total of taxes applicable for this product or service.
